database_description: This is an anonymized dump of all user-contributed content on the Stack Exchange network. Each site archive includes Posts, Users, Votes, Comments, Badges, Tags,  PostHistory, and PostLinks.

badges.description: "Achievement tags" are used to record user behavior and contributions.

comments.description: Lightweight interactive text attached to questions/answers.

comments.postid: Post ID, related question or answer

posthistory.description: Full edit and status change log for posts (questions/answers).

posthistorytypeid: Post History Type:
1 = Initial Title - initial title (questions only)
2 = Initial Body - initial post raw body text
3 = Initial Tags - initial list of tags (questions only)
4 = Edit Title - modified title (questions only)
5 = Edit Body - modified post body (raw markdown)
6 = Edit Tags - modified list of tags (questions only)
7 = Rollback Title - reverted title (questions only)
8 = Rollback Body - reverted body (raw markdown)
9 = Rollback Tags - reverted list of tags (questions only)
10 = Post Closed - post voted to be closed
11 = Post Reopened - post voted to be reopened
12 = Post Deleted - post voted to be removed
13 = Post Undeleted - post voted to be restored
14 = Post Locked - post locked by moderator
15 = Post Unlocked - post unlocked by moderator
16 = Community Owned - post now community owned
17 = Post Migrated - post migrated - now replaced by 35/36 (away/here)
18 = Question Merged - question merged with deleted question
19 = Question Protected - question was protected by a moderator.
20 = Question Unprotected - question was unprotected by a moderator.
21 = Post Disassociated - OwnerUserId removed from post by admin
22 = Question Unmerged - answers/votes restored to previously merged question
24 = Suggested Edit Applied
25 = Post Tweeted
31 = Comment discussion moved to chat
33 = Post notice added - comment contains foreign key to PostNotices
34 = Post notice removed - comment contains foreign key to PostNotices
35 = Post migrated away - replaces id 17
36 = Post migrated here - replaces id 17
37 = Post merge source - post was source of a merge
38 = Post merge destination - post was destination of a merge
50 = Bumped by Community User - post was bumped by the Community user
52 = Question became hot network question (main) / Hot Meta question (meta)
53 = Question removed from hot network/meta questions by a moderator
66 = Created from Ask Wizard - post was created from the Ask Question Wizard
comments.postid: Post ID, which question/answer corresponds to
comments.revisionguid: At times more than one type of history record can be recorded by a single action. All of these will be grouped using the same RevisionGUID
text: A raw version of the new value for a given revision
If PostHistoryTypeId in (10,11,12,13,14,15,19,20,35) this column will contain a JSON encoded string with all users who have voted for the PostHistoryTypeId
If it is a duplicate close vote, the JSON string will contain an array of original questions as OriginalQuestionIds
If PostHistoryTypeId = 17 this column will contain migration details of either from <url> or to <url>
comment: This field will contain the comment made by the user who edited a post.
If PostHistoryTypeId = 10, this field contains the CloseReasonId of the close reason (listed in CloseReasonTypes):
If PostHistoryTypeId in (33,34) this field contains the PostNoticeId of the PostNotice
comments.userdisplayname: populated if a user has been removed and no longer referenced by user Id; also happens to the author of a migrated post

postlinks.description: Structured record of "explicit relationships" between posts

linktypeid: 1 = Linked (PostId contains a link to RelatedPostId)
3 = Duplicate (PostId is a duplicate of RelatedPostId)

posts.description: You find in Posts all non-deleted posts.

posttypeid: 7 = "Wiki placeholder" (Appears to include auxiliary site content like the help center introduction, election description, and the tour page's introduction, ask, and don't ask sections)
comments.score: Total Likes/Dislikes, generally non-zero for only Questions, Answers, and Moderator Nominations
comments.lastactivitydate: datetime of the post's most recent activity
comments.title: question title, or on Stack Overflow, the tag name for some tag wikis and excerpts
comments.tags: question tags, or on Stack Overflow, the subject tag of some tag wikis and excerpts
comments.commentcount: How many comments are there under this post
comments.favoritecount: How many users have added this question to their "favorites" list
comments.lasteditdate: the date and time of the most recent edit to the post
comments.communityowneddate: The point in time when a post changed from "personally owned" to "community owned"
comments.closeddate: The date when the question was closed
comments.ownerdisplayname: If no user ID is available, record the "author's name" as a text file.
comments.lasteditordisplayname: The last editor's "display name" (when there is no UserId)

tags.description: Statistical information and metadata for each topic

comments.count: How many times has this tag been used
comments.excerptpostid: Id of Post that holds the excerpt text of the tag
comments.wikipostid: Id of Post that holds the wiki text of the tag

users.description: User static profiles and behavioral statistics

comments.lastaccessdate: Datetime user last loaded a page; updated every 30 min at most
comments.views: Number of times the profile is viewed
comments.upvotes: How many upvotes the user has cast
comments.downvotes: How many downvotes the user has cast
comments.accountid: User's Stack Exchange Network profile ID); NULL if the user has hidden this community in their profile

votes.description: User ratings and decision records for posts (questions/answers).

votetypeid: What kind of vote was cast
5 = Favorite (AKA bookmark; UserId will also be populated) feature removed after October 2022 / replaced by Saves
6 = Close (effective 2013-06-25: Close votes are only stored in table: PostHistory)
8 = BountyStart (UserId and BountyAmount will also be populated)
15 = ModeratorReview (i.e., a moderator looking at a flagged post)
